resource_notes.change: The only change is adding tilelang.PassConfigKey.TL_ENABLE_FAST_MATH: True to the pass_configs of the actually dispatched _moe_forward_kernel_all64 decorator while retaining TL_DISABLE_WARP_SPECIALIZED: True.
resource_notes.small_shape: hidden=256, intermediate=256, experts=4, valid=568, seed=81394: compiled and allclose=true. max_abs_error=7.62939453125e-06, identical to baseline; mean_abs_error=1.9332810552441515e-07 versus baseline 1.9330082068336196e-07, a 0.0141% increase.
resource_notes.p1_correctness: max_abs_error=0.00048828125, identical to baseline. mean_abs_error=9.420379683433566e-06 versus baseline 9.420145033800509e-06, a 0.002491% increase.
resource_notes.formal_protocol: p1 used seed=81394, warmup=10, iters=100, --check and passed allclose.
resource_notes.resources: Kernel code, tiles, threads, pack factors, swizzles, loops, launches, shared memory, and fragments are unchanged. The compiler emitted no register or spill diagnostics.
resource_notes.stopped_early: p1 improved by only 0.244649%, below the required 1% gate, so p2 and p3 were not run.
